title: AI-powered Customer Support Chatbot with Emotional Intelligence
scenario: Develop a prompt that will generate a high-quality, empathetic, and effective persona-based chatbot dialogue for a customer support chatbot with emotional intelligence. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates emotional understanding, active listening, and problem-solving skills. The chatbot should be able to respond to user queries, provide empathetic responses, and resolve customer complaints in a way that is both effective and respectful. The dialogue should be 5-7 lines long, use a warm and empathetic tone, and include a clear call-to-action for users to provide feedback.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 user queries and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue warm, empathetic, and respectful?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and effective?
Does the dialogue demonstrate emotional understanding, active listening, and problem-solving skills?
